title: Full Stack Developer
description:
***We are looking for Fullstack Developers to join our brilliant team***

***Decription***

We are seeking an experienced full-stack developer to join our team and contribute to the development of features for harmony ecosystem. As a software developer, you will play a key role in building and enhancing the functionality of our ecosystem. You will work closely with our engineering team to design, implement, and optimize new features, ensuring a seamless and efficient development experience.

***Requirements***

* Strong proficiency in JavaScript/Typescript programming languages
* Proficiency in server-side languages (Node.js, Java)
* Familiarity with modern frontend frameworks (React, Angular, Vue.js)
* Knowledge of responsive design principles
* Strong proficiency with version control systems
* Understanding of CI/CD practices and tools
* Experience in Agile/Scrum, good communication skills and the ability to work well in a team
* Self-motivated; independent, organized and proactive; highly responsive, flexible, and adaptable when working across multiple teams
* Good knowledge in written and spoken English
* Experience in Unit Testing (e.g. Jest, Jasmine, Karma)

***Personal Skills Required***

* Agile oriented; focused on delivery and customer first.
* Adaptive; responsive for on-demand changes.
* Dedicated; working hard to finish tasks on-time with high quality.
* Communicative; calling before sending e-mail.
* Open; collecting feedbacks and defining actions for self-improve
* Have a good level of English knowledge,
* Paying attention to details, thinking carefully and analytically,
* Documentation discipline

title: Uzman Yazılım Mühendisi
description:
STM Savunma Teknolojileri Mühendislik ve Ticaret A.Ş. olarak, savunma teknolojilerinin geleceğini şekillendiren projelerde görev alacak; uzmanlığını geliştirmek, sorumluluk alanını büyütmek ve gerçek etki üretmek isteyen profesyonellerle tanışmak istiyoruz.

İleri teknoloji projelerinde sorumluluk alabileceğiniz, teknik uzmanlığınızı yönetsel ve kişisel gelişim olanaklarıyla destekleyebileceğiniz bu yolculukta; çalışan gelişimini ve deneyimini merkeze alan yapımız ile sürdürülebilir başarıyı ve sürekli gelişimi esas alan bir kariyer fırsatı sunuyoruz.

Bu anlayışla; bilgi ve deneyimini geliştirmek isteyen, katkı sunmaktan heyecan duyan adaylarımızı
**Komuta Kontrol ve Karar Destek Sistemleri Müdürlüğü**
bünyesinde
**Yazılım Mühendisi**
pozisyonunda ekibimizin bir parçası olmaya davet ediyoruz.

**Bu Rolde Seni Neler Bekliyor?**

* Müdürlük hedeflerini gerçekleştirmek üzere, şirketin ürün geliştirme projelerinin tüm evrelerindeki yazılım mühendisliği süreçlerini gerçekleştirmek,
* Sistem gereksinimleri sonucunda ortaya çıkan yazılım gereksinimlerini karşılayacak şekilde alternatif tasarım modelleri ve yazılım geliştirmek,
* Yazılım süreçlerinde ortaya çıkan problemleri çözmek amacıyla algoritmalar oluşturmak ve algoritmaların etki ve doğruluk analizlerini yapmak,
* Gerektiği durumlarda Şirketin gelecekteki diğer projelerinde de kullanabileceği yazılım parçalarını üretmek ve bunları modüler hale getirmek,
* İş geliştirme faaliyetlerine ve proje teklif çalışmalarına destek sağlamak üzere Müdürlük bünyesindeki faaliyetlere katılım sağlamak.

**Kimi Arıyoruz?**

* Tercihen üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Elektrik-Elektronik Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinden en az lisans derecesi ile mezun,
* Yazılım geliştirme süreçleri ve yazılım yaşam döngüsü konusunda deneyimli,
* Gereksinim yönetim araçları (DOORS vb.) kullanımı konusunda tecrübeli,
* Haberleşme protokolleri (TCP/IP, UDP, CANBus, SNMP, seri haberleşme vb.) hakkında deneyim sahibi,
* Analitik düşünme ve algoritma tasarımı konusunda yetkin,
* C/C++ dillerinde yazılım geliştirme konusunda en az 3 yıl deneyimli,
* Qt Framework kullanarak yazılım geliştirme tecrübesine sahip,
* UML ile tasarım ve geliştirme süreçlerinde bilgi ve deneyim sahibi,
* Farklı yazılım mimarileri hakkında bilgi ve uygulama deneyimi bulunan,
* Git ve benzeri konfigürasyon / versiyon kontrol araçlarını aktif kullanan,
* Coğrafi Bilgi Sistemleri (GIS) kullanarak yazılım geliştirme tecrübesine sahip olmak,
* Rhapsody vb. modelleme ve tasarım araçları konusunda deneyimli olmak,
* Yurtiçi ve yurtdışı seyahat engeli bulunmamak.

title: Uygulama Yazılımı Mühendisi
description:
ASELSAN Radar ve Elektronik Harp Sistemleri (REHİS) Sektör Başkanlığı bünyesindeki yazılım faaliyetlerimizde bize güç katacak
*üniversitelerin Bilgisayar veya Elektrik-Elektronik Mühendisliği bölümlerinden mezun*
**Uygulama Yazılımı Mühendisi**
çalışma arkadaşları arıyoruz.

**BU POZİSYONDA EN ÖNEM VERDİĞİMİZ YETKİNLİKLER VE DENEYİMLER**

* Çevik yazılım geliştirme süreçleri (Scrum vb.) hakkında bilgi sahibi ve tercihen çevik yaklaşımları tecrübe etmiş,
* Yazılım Yaşam Döngüsü Evrelerine (gereksinim analizi, tasarım, geliştirme, test ve entegrasyon) hâkim,
* Java Programlama
  üst seviyede
  hâkim ve bu dilde geliştirme yapmış,
* Veri yapıları, temel algoritma kavramları ile nesne yönelimli analiz, tasarım ve programlama alanlarında deneyim sahibi,
* Temel Web teknolojilerini (HTML, Javascript, Typescript, ReactJS) iyi derecede bilen, Kafka, Redis, Elasticsearch, PostgreSQL vb. araçlar hakkında bilgi sahibi,
* Spring Framework, Spring Boot ile uygulama geliştirme deneyimine sahip,
* Servis yönelimli mimari (tercihen Mikroservis, OSGi), container mimarileri (tercihen Docker, Kubernetes), veri tabanları hakkında bilgi sahibi,
* Soket programlama konusunda bilgi sahibi,
* Git, Doors, JIRA, Nexus, Jenkins, Sonarqube gibi Yazılım Yaşam Döngüsü ürünleri hakkında bilgi sahibi,
* Tercihen ürün hattı konusunda bilgi sahibi.

**SENDEN NELER BEKLİYORUZ?**

* Yeni başlayan projeler kapsamında, “
  **Kullanıcı Arayüzü**
  ” yazılımları geliştirme faaliyetlerinde yer alarak gereksinimlerin belirlenmesi, yazılımın tasarımı ve geliştirilmesi,
* Mevcut yazılımların idame ve iyileştirmelerinin yapılması,
* Şirket içi ve dışı paydaşlarla teknik/idari iletişimin sağlanması.

*\\*İşe alım kriterlerimizi ASELSAN internet sayfamızda Kariyer Sekmesinde bulunan İşe Alım Sürecimiz alanından inceleyerek iş başvuru formumuzu doldur. Aselsan ailesinin bir parçası olarak yerli ve milli projelerdeki başarımızda senin de imzan olsun.*

***Biz Kimiz?***

Alanında dünyanın en iyi ürünlerini yapma, oyun değiştirici teknolojiler geliştirme ve ihracat odaklı büyüme hedeflerimizle ülkemize ve dünyanın dört bir yanındaki kullanıcılarımıza değer katan küresel bir markayız.

title: Software Developer
description:
**Welcome sahibinden.com world!**

We work for WOW? moments

We stay curious and explore, we love innovation

We look into the same topics from different perspectives

We celebrate and feel proud of our success together

**S- technology**
;

Sahibinden.com has been helping people meet their dreams for the last 26 years. With more than 55 million users and approximately with its 1000 employees, sahibinden.com is among the top five companies globally in classifieds sector. Approved in 2017 as an R&D center in Turkey, sahibinden.com has been the pioneer of a variety of new services and provide continuous and reliable service over the web and mobile networks. Through our dynamic and agile teams, we continue to be a driving force in the digital marketplace by developing scalable and high-performance platforms that serve millions of users daily. At sahibinden.com, we adopt a culture of innovation and continuous improvement at work to empower our employees. This approach, which fosters creative thinking and professional development, consistently earns us the title of one of The Best Workplaces in Europe, as voted by our employees.

Join us and be a part of our journey to redefine the future of e-commerce.

As a sahibinden.com developer, generally speaking, you will be;

* developing payment platform features within your business roadmap
* working on technical features and participating in the technology transition projects working to reduce overall bugs in your domain

**What You Bring**

We respect differences in personalities and varying approaches to getting your work done. Having said that, we look for individuals who are

* Team players
* Resilient, result-oriented people
* Optimistic individuals
* Strong in analytical skills
* Smart, analytical, and creative problem solver
* 4 year bachelor degree in CS or relevant field
* Experienced in the Java programming language
* Minimum 4 year of software development experience in a hands on coding, preferably in banking or payment systems
* Familiar with Java, Spring, Kafka, MySQL and Mongodb
* Preferably experienced in data structures, algorithms, and performance analysis
* Experienced with good software engineering practices, including the application of patterns and unit testing
* Practically experienced of SQL and NoSQL databases including data modelling
* Core XP practices of TDD, Pair Programming, and Continuous Integration
* Advocate for the best practices in software engineering
* Experienced in the implementation of microservice architectures
* Experienced in building large-scale web applications
* Experienced with containerization technologies such as Kubernetes and Docker
* Experienced with cloud technologies

**What We Offer**

* Birthday leave
* 2 weeks of remote work available throughout the year
* One week accommodation at Richmond Efes and Pamukkale Hotels (for employees who have completed 3 years at Sahibinden.com)
* Well-being opportunities;
* Quality life package
* Gym and Dietician service

*Your personal data to be collected within the scope of the applications you will make through this job posting, will be carried out and processed for the purposes of conducting job application processes and evaluating your job application by Sahibinden Bilgi Teknolojileri Pazarlama ve Ticaret Anonim Şirketi (“Sahibinden”) as a data controller in accordance with the Law on the Protection of Personal Data No. 6698 (“KVKK”) and the relevant legislation.*

*We believe in the importance of equal treatment in our recruitment process. Inline with our diversity, equality and inclusion policy, we evaluate each application process in a transparent and fair manner and we focus on the skills of each applicant regardless of religion, race or gender.*

title: Yazılım Geliştirme Mühendisi
description:
ASELSAN Kurumsal Yönetim Genel Müdür Yardımcılığı bünyesindeki faaliyetlerimizde bize güç katacak;
*üniversitelerin Bilgisayar, Elektrik, Elektronik, Elektronik Haberleşme Mühendisliği bölümlerinden*
*mezun*
**Yazılım Geliştirme Mühendisi**
çalışma arkadaşları arıyoruz.

**BU POZİSYONDA EN ÖNEM VERDİĞİMİZ YETKİNLİKLER VE DENEYİMLER**

* Yazılım geliştirme alanında tercihen en az 5 yıl deneyimli,
* .NET teknolojilerine (özellikle .NET Core ve C#) hâkim,
* Full Stack geliştirme konusunda deneyimli (Backend ve Frontend),
* MS SQL, PostgreSQL gibi ilişkisel veritabanlarında sorgu geliştirme konusunda yetkin,
* Redis, MongoDB, ElasticSearch gibi bazı NoSQL teknolojilerinde deneyimli,
* RabbitMQ, Kafka gibi MQ teknolojileri hakkında bilgi sahibi,
* Clean Code ve test odaklı yazılım geliştirme yaklaşımını benimseyen,
* Yazılım mimarileri (DDD, Microservice, Event-Driven vb.) hakkında bilgi sahibi,
* Tercihen İnsan Kaynakları iş süreçlerine yönelik yazılım geliştirme deneyimine sahip,
* Mimari bakış açısı ile iş süreçleri kapsamında tasarım konusunda bilgi sahibi,
* Dijital dönüşüm ihtiyaçlarını belirleme, önceliklendirme, üst düzey stratejilerle entegre etme, uygulama ve yaygınlaştırma konularında tecrübe sahibi,
* Gereksinim analizi, tasarım, geliştirme, test ve entegrasyon dahil olmak üzere tüm yazılım yaşam döngüsü süreçlerine hakim,
* Agile Kanban/Scrum metodolojilerle yürütülen projelerde aktif rol alan.

**SENDEN NELER BEKLİYORUZ?**

* ASELSAN’ın kurumsal dijital dönüşümü kapsamında, İnsan Kaynakları iş süreçleri için dijital çözüm ve iyileştirme çalışmalarının yazılım tarafındaki sorumluluklarını yürütmek yürütmek,
* Süreçlerin ve sistemlerin kavramsal ve teknik tasarımında ve geliştirmesinde görev almak,
* Teknolojik gelişmeleri takip ederek ihtiyaç duyulabilecek yeni teknolojilerin ASELSAN'a kazandırılması için gerekli çalışmaları planlamak.

*İşe alım kriterlerimizi ASELSAN internet sayfamızda Kariyer Sekmesinde bulunan İşe Alım Sürecimiz alanından inceleyerek iş başvuru formumuzu doldur. ASELSAN ailesinin bir parçası olarak yerli ve milli projelerdeki başarımızda senin de imzan olsun.*

***Biz Kimiz?***

Alanında dünyanın en iyi ürünlerini yapma, oyun değiştirici teknolojiler geliştirme ve ihracat odaklı büyüme hedeflerimizle ülkemize ve dünyanın dört bir yanındaki kullanıcılarımıza değer katan küresel bir markayız.

title: Yapay Zeka Geliştirme ve Uygulama Mühendisi
description:
ASELSAN Ulaşım, Güvenlik, Enerji, Otomasyon ve Sağlık Sistemleri (UGES) Sektör Başkanlığı bünyesinde Macunköy yerleşkesindeki faaliyetlerimizde bize güç katacak;
*üniversitelerin Elektrik Elektronik, Bilgisayar, Yapay Zeka Mühendisliği bölümlerinden mezun*
Y
**apay Zeka Geliştirme ve Uygulama Mühendisi**
çalışma arkadaşları arıyoruz.

**BU POZİSYONDA EN ÖNEM VERDİĞİMİZ YETKİNLİKLER VE DENEYİMLER**

* ASELSAN bünyesinde yürütülen Yapay zeka odaklı görüntü, sinyal, veri ve/veya dil işleme konularında en az 2 yıl deneyim sahibi,
* Yapay zeka veri toplama, etiketleme, model geliştirme/değiştirme, model eğitme, uyarlama ve donanıma uyarlama optimizasyonları konularından en az 3 ünde deneyim sahibi,
* C, C++, CUDA programlama dillerinden en az birini, Python/MATLAB dillerinden en az birini belirli bir düzeyde bilen ve bu dillerde kod geliştirme konusunda yetkin,
* Farklı yapay zeka modelleri (CNN, RNN, LSTM, Auto Encoder, Transformers, hibrid modeller vb.) konusunda bilgi ve/veya deneyim sahibi,
* Linux ortamında yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde tecrübeli,
* Geliştirilen kodların ve kullanılan verilerin versiyon kontrolü konusunda farkındalığı ve bir miktar tecrübesi olan,
* Yurt içi/yurt dışı iş seyahatlerine ve saha görevlerine engel durumu bulunmayan.

**SENDEN NELER BEKLİYORUZ?**

ASELSAN UGES Sektör Başkanlığı tarafından geliştirilen görüntüleme ve algılama amaçlı farklı sensörlere ait ham verilerin ya da işlenmiş meta-verilerin anlamlandırılması konusunda;

* Algoritma ve yapay zeka model geliştirmek,
* Bu geliştirme için gerekli verilerin toplanması için tanım oluşturmak,
* Model eğitmek,
* Model ve/veya algoritmaları uç veya merkezi platformlarda uyarlamak,
* Model çıktılarının tanımlı kayıt alt yapılarıyla haberleştirilmesi konusunda protokol uyarlamak,
* Geliştirilen algoritma ve/veya yapay zeka modellerinin algoritmaların yazılım uyarlamalarını gerçekleştirmek,
* Cihazlara katılan algoritmik yeteneklerinin gereksinimlerinin yazılması ve takibi konusunda farklı araçları kullanarak sistem ve proje ekipleriyle uyumlu çalışmak,
* Cihazlarda uyarlanan algoritmaların saha testlerinde denenmesi, başarım ve performans ölçümü konularında raporlamak.

*İşe alım kriterlerimizi ASELSAN internet sayfamızda Kariyer Sekmesinde bulunan İşe Alım Sürecimiz alanından inceleyerek iş başvuru formumuzu doldur. ASELSAN ailesinin bir parçası olarak yerli ve milli projelerdeki başarımızda senin de imzan olsun.*

**Biz Kimiz?**

Alanında dünyanın en iyi ürünlerini yapma, oyun değiştirici teknolojiler geliştirme ve ihracat odaklı büyüme hedeflerimizle ülkemize ve dünyanın dört bir yanındaki kullanıcılarımıza değer katan küresel bir markayız.

title: Karar Destek ve Simülasyon Yazılım Mühendisi
description:
ASELSAN Aviyonik ve Güdüm Sistemleri (AGS) Sektör Başkanlığı bünyesinde Akyurt yerleşkesindeki faaliyetlerimizde bize güç katacak;
*üniversitelerin Bilgisayar, Elektrik-Elektronik veya ilgili bölümlerinden mezun*
**Karar Destek ve Simülasyon Yazılım Mühendisi**
çalışma arkadaşları arıyoruz.

**BU POZİSYONDA EN ÖNEM VERDİĞİMİZ YETKİNLİKLER VE DENEYİMLER**

* Modern yazılım geliştirme teknolojileri ve yazılım mimarisi yaklaşımlarına hakim,
* Coğrafi veri işleme veya GIS teknolojileri konusunda bilgi sahibi,
* 2D ve 3D harita tabanlı görselleştirme bileşenleri konusunda deneyimli,
* Web tabanlı uygulama geliştirme konusunda deneyimli,
* Yazılım mimarisi ve sistem tasarımı konularında analitik düşünme yeteneğine sahip,
* Modern frameworkler ve geliştirme araçları ile geliştirme deneyimi bulunan,
* Büyük ölçekli yazılım mimarisi tasarlama tecrübesi bulunan,
* Tercihen oyun motorları veya gerçek zamanlı simülasyon sistemleri ile çalışma deneyimi bulunan (Unity/Unreal Engine),
* Tercihen oyun motoru mimarileri ve sahne yönetimi konusunda bilgi sahibi olan,
* Versiyon kontrol sistemleri (tercihen GIT) konusunda deneyim sahibi olan,
* Seyahat engeli bulunmayan.

**SENDEN NELER BEKLİYORUZ?**

* Harita ve veri tabanlı yazılım sistemlerinin tasarım ve geliştirme çalışmalarında görev almak,
* Farklı simülasyon senaryolarının modellenebileceği yazılım altyapılarının geliştirilmesine katkı sağlamak,
* Analiz, planlama ve optimizasyon problemlerine yönelik algoritmaların yazılım sistemlerine entegrasyonunu gerçekleştirmek,
* Kullanıcı dostu ve yüksek performanslı yazılım bileşenleri geliştirmek,
* Modern yazılım geliştirme araçları ve frameworklerini kullanarak ölçeklenebilir yazılım mimarileri tasarlamak,
* Yazılım geliştirme sürecinde analiz, tasarım, geliştirme ve test faaliyetlerinde görev almak,
* Projelerde geliştirilen yazılım bileşenlerinin dokümantasyonunu hazırlamak ve güncel tutmak,
* Yapay zeka destekli karar destek ve analiz modüllerinin geliştirilmesine katkı sağlamak,
* Büyük ölçekli yazılım mimarisi tasarlamak.

*İşe alım kriterlerimizi ASELSAN internet sayfamızda Kariyer Sekmesinde bulunan İşe Alım Sürecimiz alanından inceleyerek iş başvuru formumuzu doldur. ASELSAN ailesinin bir parçası olarak yerli ve milli projelerdeki başarımızda senin de imzan olsun.*

**Biz Kimiz?**

Alanında dünyanın en iyi ürünlerini yapma, oyun değiştirici teknolojiler geliştirme ve ihracat odaklı büyüme hedeflerimizle ülkemize ve dünyanın dört bir yanındaki kullanıcılarımıza değer katan küresel bir markayız.

title: Yapay Zeka Mühendisi
description:
**GENEL NİTELİKLER**

* Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yapay ZekaMühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Matematik, İstatistik bölümlerinden mezun olan,
* Takım çalışmasına yatkın ve sorumluluk sahibi olan,
* Analitik düşünce kabiliyeti olan, yeniliklere açık olan,
* Literatürü takip edecek derecede İngilizce bilgisi olan,

**MESLEKİ NİTELİKLER**

* Makine Öğrenmesi ve Derin Öğrenme için veri hazırlanması, model eğitilmesi ve test edilmesi konularında çalışmış olan,
* Bilgisayarlı Görü (Computer Vision) alanında görüntü sınıflandırma, nesne tespiti ve segmentasyonu konularına hakim olan,
* Büyük Dil Modelleri (LLMs) alanında çalışma deneyimi olan,
* Temel görüntü işleme bilgisine sahip ve tercihen medikal görüntüler üzerinde tecrübe sahibi olan,
* C, C++, MATLAB ve Python dillerinin birinde en az 2 yıl deneyim ve tercihen Python programlama dilinde uzmanlığa sahip olan,
* Tensorflow, Keras ve Pytorch kütüphanelerinden en az birine hakim olan,
* Model optimizasyonu, hyperparameter tuning ve performans iyileştirme konularında deneyimli,
* Geliştirilen yapay zeka modellerinin REST API ve/veya Docker Konteyner teknolojileri kullanarak ürünleştirme tecrübesi olan,
* Analitik ve algoritmik düşünce yeteneğine sahip, çalıştığı alanda akademik yayınları ve son gelişmeleri takip eden,
* GPU programlama bilgisi (CUDA),
* Literatür taraması yapma becerisine sahip olan,
* Akademik yayın yapma tecrübesine sahip olan
* Sahada kullanılan yapay zeka sistemlerinin performans iyileştirilmesi ve hızlı model eğitimi konularında deneyimli,
* Büyük veri setleriyle çalışma ve veri kalitesi iyileştirme süreçlerinde tecrübeli,
* Medikal yapay zeka projelerinde görev almış,

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Who We Are**
OPLOG is the tech engine behind seamless e‑commerce fulfillment for top brands across Türkiye, Europe, and the US. By fusing in‑house software with robotics and automation, we erase the line between the physical and digital worlds—delivering post‑purchase experiences that turn customers into fans and giving our clients an unfair competitive edge.
  
  
We’re building a world-class robotic fulfillment ecosystem, and we’re looking for curious minds to shape the future with us.
  
  
**About the Role:**
We’re scaling—fast. Our platforms, robots, and data pipelines need to move even faster. We’re assembling a new Tech Team to push boundaries, kill technical debt, and ship resilient systems that keep warehouses humming worldwide. Your code will touch conveyor belts, scanners, and sorting robots—in real‑time.
  
  
**What You'll Be Building**

* Core services that orchestrate logistics robots and automation systems 24/7.
* Scalable and durable systems, APIs & integrations connecting e-commerce, WMS, and carriers.
* Refactors of legacy domains—paying down tech debt and simplifying complexity.
* Operational excellence tooling with product managers & domain experts.
* AI-powered features that supercharge our internal tools and decision engines.
* Cloud-native infrastructure (AWS & Azure) built for durability and observability.

**This Role Might Be For You If…**

* You have 3+ years crafting backend or full-stack systems in C# / .NET.
* Large, gnarly codebases excite you; refactoring is your Zen.
* Bugs in prod = puzzles 🤔 → 💡.
* TDD, Pair Programming, and Clean Code aren't buzzwords—they're muscle memory.
* You're fluent in OOD, SOLID & design patterns.
* You're open to travel to warehouses to participate in the delivery lifecycle of systems that orchestrate physical operations.
* Full-stack chops (React/TypeScript or Flutter/Dart) is a big plus.
* You're comfortable with on-call rotation.

**You'll Thrive Here If You…**

* Hate bureaucracy and love ownership.
* Ask "How might we?" more than "We can't because…".
* Pair with stakeholders, demo in the warehouse, and ship for impact.
* Believe AI-enhanced coding is the new normal.
* Stay optimistic, resilient, and customer-obsessed.

**The Tools We Use**

* NET Core | EF Core | C# | AWS & Azure | PostgreSQL | Elasticsearch | Grafana

DDD | Clean Architecture | AI‑assisted IDEs
  
  
React + TypeScript | Flutter for full-stack chops
  
  
**What We Offer**

* AI‑assisted coding & LLM licenses – build smarter, faster
* Paid vacation in your first year – no waiting period
* Birthday day off – celebrate you
* Flexible hours & open kitchen – fuel creativity on your schedule
* Private health insurance – from day one
* Shuttle service or monthly gas card – your commute, covered
* Meal card – lunches on us
* Learning budget – for courses, books, and conferences
* Massage Fridays – at our Cyberpark office
* Unlimited fun at the office – anytime
* Mac or PC – your choice of tools
* English courses – grow your communication skills globally

Ready to join us and shape the robotic future of fulfillment?
  
  
**Apply now.**

title: Software Engineer - Python - Ubuntu Pro client - graduate level
description:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation, and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.
  
  
The company is founder-led, profitable, and growing.
  
  
We are hiring a Software Engineer to develop, test and release improvements to the Ubuntu Pro client.
  
  
Ubuntu Pro is a suite of specialist services provided by Canonical. Whether for enterprise customers deploying systems at scale or users who want security patching for their personal Ubuntu LTS at home, the Ubuntu Pro Client is the command-line tool that manages all these services.
  
  
The quality and stability of the Ubuntu Pro Client is critically important, since it comes pre-installed on every Ubuntu system. You'll work with the Ubuntu Server team, alongside major cloud partners and multiple Canonical product teams to develop, test and release improvements to the Pro client. You will also be a voice in communication with our users, ensuring their needs are met.
  
  
This role requires quality-oriented software engineering in Python and a focus on software interoperability over a vast range of target releases and environments. Excellent Python skills are a key requirement, with previous contributions to open source Python projects being an advantage. The Pro client often interacts with the Ubuntu package management; therefore, experience in configuring apt, and knowledge of deb packaging and general system administration is advantageous in this role.
  
  
Applicants should be passionate about the Ubuntu project and its values and about building tools that are used by millions of people around the world. A personal interest and emphasis on quality, thinking of edge cases, ease of use, documentation, and careful community coordination is important. The Pro client is used at all ranges, from mission-critical environments to hobbyist Ubuntu users; applicants should be ready to work with the whole spectrum of end users and help guide engineering best practices with all of them in mind.
  
  
The role entails
  
  

* Collaborate proactively with a distributed team
* Write high quality code, with unit and functional tests, to create new features
* Debug issues and produce high quality code to fix them
* Review code produced by other engineers
* Discuss ideas and investigate to find good solutions
* Work from home, with global travel 2 to 4 weeks per year for internal and external events

What we are looking for in you
  
  

* You love technology and working with brilliant people
* You are curious, flexible, articulate, and accountable
* You value soft skills and are passionate, enterprising, thoughtful, and self-motivated
* You have a Bachelor's or equivalent in Computer Science, STEM or similar degree
* You have extensive experience with Python on Linux
* You have interest in and experience with two or more of the following: Ubuntu Linux systems administration, continuous integration, end-system contract management, Debian packaging, working with public or on premise clouds
* Bonus points if you have experience engaging with the open source community

**What we offer colleagues**
We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
  
  

* Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Team Member Assistance Program & Wellness Platform
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass and travel upgrades for long-haul company events

**About Canonical**
Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open-source projects and the platform for AI, IoT, and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence; in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since our inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
  
  
**Canonical is an equal opportunity employer**
We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

description:

**About Sezzle:**
With a mission to financially empower the next generation, Sezzle is revolutionizing the shopping experience beyond payments, blending cutting-edge tech with seamless, interest-free installment plans that make shopping smarter and more accessible. We’re not just transforming payments; we’re redefining how people discover, interact with, and purchase the things they love while driving real impact on merchant sales through increased conversions and higher order values. As we continue to shape the future of fintech and retail, we’re building an innovative, dynamic team passionate about creating more than just a transaction but a truly unique shopping journey. If you’re excited about pushing boundaries in tech and delivering a game-changing experience for consumers and merchants alike, come join us at Sezzle and help create the future of shopping!
  
  
**About the Role:**
We are seeking a talented and motivated
**Junior Software engineer**
who is best in class with a high IQ plus a high EQ. This role presents an exciting opportunity to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment within a rapidly growing team, with abundant prospects for career advancement. The Junior Software Engineer will assist us with the design, development, and installation of software solutions. Your duties will include development, writing code, and documenting functionality. You should be able to build high-quality, innovative and fully performing software in compliance with coding standards and technical design.
  
  
**Compensation**
:
  
  
For this junior development role, with 0-3 years of experience, the compensation range is $1,500 - $3,000 USD per month. This range is designed to accommodate early-career professionals and reflects the foundational skills and potential for growth within the role.
  
  
**Interview Process**
We believe transparency is important at Sezzle. Regularly providing feedback while setting expectations is part of our culture starting with the interview process. Advancement through each step is not guaranteed.
  
  

* Application submitted (you are here)
* Wonderlic test (30-40 min)
* Coding assessment (:1.5 hours)
* Interview with recruiters (30 min)
* Interview with engineers (1 hour)
* Interview with engineering leadership (30-45 min)
* Offer!

**Sezzle Technical Stack:**

* Golang backend, React / React Native front-end
* Grafana / Loki / Prometheus metrics
* Kubernetes
* AWS
* Amazon Aurora (MySQL) RDS
* Gitlab CI/CD deployments
* Unit, Integration, and end-to-end testing

**Responsibilities:**

* Be an integral part of the software development lifecycle
* Work as an integrated team member developing new features
* Evaluate and deploy software tools, processes, and metrics
* Provide support and consulting on software systems usage
* Ensure compliance with project plans and industry standards

**Ideal Skills and Experience:**

* Experience working on single page web applications (SPA)
* Experience with backend API development
* Experience with relational database storage and retrieval
* Familiarity with software engineering tools, software development methodology, and release processes
* BS degree in Computer Science or Engineering, or equivalent experience

**Sezzle’s Technology Stack:**

* Languages: Golang, Typescript, Python
* Frontend: Typescript - React and React Native
* Backend: Golang
* Database: MySQL, Postgres, Elasticsearch
* DevOps & Cloud: AWS, Kubernetes
* Version Control: Git
* CI/CD: Gitlab
* Testing: Developer-driven, focus on automated unit, integration, and end-to-end tests
* Sezzle is focused on using open source, and we build what we can before buying!

**About You:**

* You have relentlessly high standards - many people may think your standards are unreasonably high. You are continually raising the bar and driving those around you to deliver great results. You make sure that defects do not get sent down the line and that problems are fixed so they stay fixed.
* You’re not bound by convention - your success—and much of the fun—lies in developing new ways to do things
* You need action - speed matters in business. Many decisions and actions are reversible and do not need extensive study. We value calculated risk-taking.
* You earn trust - you listen attentively, speak candidly, and treat others respectfully.
* You have backbone; disagree, then commit - you can respectfully challenge decisions when you disagree, even when doing so is uncomfortable or exhausting. You have conviction and are tenacious. You do not compromise for the sake of social cohesion. Once a decision is determined, you commit wholly.
* You deliver results - you focus on the key inputs and deliver them with the right quality and in a timely fashion. Despite setbacks, you rise to the occasion and never settle.

**What Makes Working at Sezzle Awesome:**
At Sezzle, we are more than just brilliant engineers, passionate data enthusiasts, out-of-the-box thinkers, and determined innovators. We believe in surrounding ourselves with only the best and the brightest individuals. Our culture is not defined by a certain set of perks designed to give the illusion of the traditional startup culture, but rather, it is the visible example living in every employee that we hire.
  
  
#Full-time

title: Software Developer
description:
Founded in 2012, Obilet.com is a leading travel and tourism platform offering comprehensive services, including bus, flight, and ferry ticketing, along with hotel bookings and car rentals.

As the undisputed market leader in Turkey across both B2B and B2C segments, the platform supports bus carriers with its best-in-class SaaS Inventory Management System (IMS), attracts 25 million monthly visitors, and boasts 15 million app downloads.

Projected to mediate over 50 million transactions in 2025, Obilet is expanding internationally to become one of the largest global players in the travel tech industry.

We are looking for a “Sr. Software Developer / Software Developer” for our Technology Team. If you want to join as a part of our ongoing succes story, apply now!

**Main responsibilities will include:**

* As a full-stack developer, you will take end-to-end responsibility for developing and delivering new features of obilet.com's B2B & B2C web applications and business API along with the current system’s maintenance
* Contributing to design and development phases for obilet web application front-end and business API back-end
* Identifying, investigating, and implementing applicable solutions to business requirements
* Ensure obilet web application and business API meet current web standards & accessibility requirements
* Following industry best practices in design and product development, also taking initiative in recommending possible enhancements

**To be successful in this role, you need to have:**

* 3 years of experience in developing and maintaining products with real-world usage in .NET Core and/or client-side frameworks
* Experience in developing interactive web interfaces using Javascript, HTML5, CSS3
* Experience in developing web applications with critical mobile compatibility and cross-browser compatibility requirements
* Experience in web services - RESTful services with ASP.NET Core Web API is a plus
* Experience with Entity Framework and/or NHibernate ORMs
* Good knowledge of T/SQL and MSSQL Server
* Worked on platforms deployed on Microsoft Azure and/or Amazon Web Services
* Experience with JS frameworks (React, Angular.js, Vue.js, etc)
* Experience in working on projects that involved build procedures based on Gulp / Grunt
* Dev-ops experience with cloud platforms (Amazon Web Services and/or Microsoft Azure.)

title: Insider One - Future Devs Internship Program
description:
Before jumping into all the information about the role and what you can bring to the table, let us introduce ourselves real quick.
  
  
**About Us**
Insider One is the
**#1 platform**
that brings everything marketing and customer engagement teams need in one place so they can reach their peak potential and
**become unstoppable.**
Our story began with six desks and a vision to create a single platform to make industry-first technologies and emerging channels accessible to marketers worldwide. Today, Insider One is powered
**by 1,500+ team members representing 50+ nationalities across 30+ offices**
. With AI at its core and an integrated Customer Data Platform (CDP),
**Insider One unites data, personalization, and journey orchestration across the most extensive set of natively supported channels**
, including WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Web, App, and Site Search.
  
  
We recently raised one of the largest funding rounds in the industry,
**a $500M Series E led by General Atlantic**
. We are backed by top-notch investors, including
**Sequoia Capital, QIA, Riverwood, and Endeavor Catalyst**
, and trusted by 2000+ customers from high-growth startups to the most prestigious Fortune 500 companies such as Samsung, Nike, L’Oreal, Singapore Airlines, Nestlé, Nissan, Lenovo, Puma, IKEA, Allianz, Domino's, and the list goes on.
  
  
Insider One was congratulated for becoming one of the only
**woman-founded, women-led B2B SaaS unicorns**
in the world. Loved by customers, recognized by analysts,
**we are the only vendor recognized as the #1 leader**
in all the capabilities marketing and customer engagement teams need. Don’t just take our word for it — see for yourself. We consistently outperform and continue our leadership, and the results speak for themselves.
  
  
From day one, Insider One’s mission has not only been to build a world-class product company, but also to create one of the
**most socially progressive technology communities**
in the world. Through our social responsibility initiatives like
*100 Social Responsibility Projects, AI Training for Teachers, Code Academy, SheCodes, SheLeads, and SheMarkables*
, our community has committed to scaling its impact on our communities across 30+ countries, driving initiatives in health, education, farming, animal rights, and increasing women’s representation in STEM.
  
  
Behind all these achievements is
**an exceptionally talented, visionary team of overachievers**
that moves fast and agile, creating cutting-edge products, and focuses on making an impact. If you want to be a part of this journey, just keep reading.
  
  
**What You Will Do**

* Contribute to real production systems used by global customers
* Design and implement APIs, services, and application components (backend and/or frontend)
* Collaborate closely with senior engineers and learn modern software architecture hands-on
* Participate in agile ceremonies, technical discussions, and code reviews
* Take ownership of features and ship them end-to-end
* Work on scalable, high-availability systems and understand how real-world products operate
* Improve system performance, reliability, and maintainability
* Continuously level up your technical and problem-solving skills through mentorship and feedback
* This isn’t a simulation
* You won’t be solving toy problems
* You’ll be building systems that matter

**What You Will Gain**

* Real production experience before graduation
* 1:1 mentorship from experienced engineers
* Exposure to scalable architectures and cloud environments
* A strong engineering foundation that differentiates you in the job market
* The opportunity to convert to a full-time Software Engineer position based on your performance
* Many of our strongest engineers started their journey through this program

**What You Will Need**

* Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field
* Hands-on experience in at least one programming language (Go, Java, Python, PHP, JavaScript, etc.)
* Basic understanding of databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, or similar)
* Familiarity with algorithms, data structures, and fundamental software principles
* Experience with Git or version control systems
* Curiosity, ownership mindset, and a strong desire to grow
* A passion for writing clean, maintainable code
* If you’ve worked on personal projects, contributed to open-source, or have a GitHub portfolio
* If you’ve participated in hackathons, tech communities, or coding competitions

**Why Join Insider One?**

* Because your first step into tech should be meaningful
* Because you deserve to build, not just observe
* Because your career deserves a strong start
* If you’re ambitious, curious, and ready to grow fast — we’re ready for you

***We expect our interns to join us full-time throughout the summer and continue contributing at least three days per week during the academic year.***
Thanks for stopping by our stand and taking the time to connect with us.
  
  
We believe careers are built through curiosity, learning, and meaningful connections — and this is just the beginning.
  
  
Looking forward to staying in touch. 🚀
  
  
We provide equal opportunity in a zero-discrimination workplace and not just welcome but also embrace everyone without regard to sex, race, color, nationality, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability status, citizenship, or marital status.

title: Jr Software Engineer
description:
**Job Overview**
Join Mindsite as a Junior Software Engineer and contribute to the growth and scalability of our data platform. Ideal for professionals eager to gain hands-on experience in building and maintaining web applications, ensuring data accuracy, and supporting real-time data operations across multiple websites.
  
  
**What We’re Looking For**

* Up to 1 year of experience in software development or related fields.
* Familiarity with Python for web scraping, crawling, and data processing tasks.
* Basic understanding of SQL for analyzing and validating data.
* Experience working with APIs for data integration and real-time synchronization.
* Interest in web application development and adapting new platforms to internal systems.
* Strong attention to detail and commitment to ensuring data accuracy.
* Ability to work in remote, collaborative, and fast-paced environments.
* Eagerness to learn, take ownership, and grow within a dynamic team.

**In This Role, You Will**

* Support the onboarding of 650+ web applications into Mindsite’s platform, ensuring smooth integration and maintenance.
* Assist in crawling, scraping, and validating data from multiple websites.
* Perform SQL data analysis to confirm data consistency and quality.
* Work with APIs to synchronize data in real time across our systems.
* Collaborate with senior engineers to implement best practices and improve platform performance.
* Contribute to problem-solving discussions and suggest improvements in workflows.
* Continuously learn new tools and techniques to strengthen the platform and your skills.

**What We Offer**

* Competitive Compensation: Salary indexed to foreign currency rates, plus performance-based bonuses.
* Flexible Benefits: Health insurance, Apple devices, meal cards, therapy & wellness reimbursements, and more.
* Time Off That Respects You: 10+ vacation days plus your birthday off.
* A Culture That Builds Leaders: Join a driven, collaborative team shaping the future of e-commerce with industry leaders like P , Unilever, and Colgate-Palmolive.
* Endless Learning Opportunities: Stay on top of industry trends and sharpen your skills with continuous learning support.
* Fully Remote Work: The freedom to work from wherever you are most productive.

**About Mindsite**
Mindsite is a fast-growing SaaS company helping brands win online through actionable e-commerce analytics. From product availability and pricing to visibility and sentiment, we empower leading FMCG players with insights that fuel growth.
  
  
Ready to make an impact? We can’t wait to see what you bring!

title: Yazılım Mühendisi
description:

Yazılım geliştirme ekibimize katılacak, modern teknolojilerle çözüm üretebilecek, öğrenmeye ve gelişmeye açık takım arkadaşları arıyoruz.

title: Software Developer / Intercontinental Support – Insider One Testinium Tech Hub Cooperation (Fresh Grad/Junior)(Remote)
description:
Before jumping into all the information about the role and what you can bring to the table, let us introduce ourselves real quick.
  
  
**About Us**
Insider One is the
**#1 platform**
that brings everything marketing and customer engagement teams need in one place so they can reach their peak potential and
**become unstoppable.**
Our story began with six desks and a vision to create a single platform to make industry-first technologies and emerging channels accessible to marketers worldwide. Today, Insider One is powered by
**1,500+ team members representing 50+ nationalities across 30+ offices**
. With AI at its core and an integrated Customer Data Platform (CDP),
**Insider One unites data, personalization, and journey orchestration across the most extensive set of natively supported channels, including WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Web, App, and Site Search.**
We recently raised one of the largest funding rounds in the industry,
**a $500M Series E led by General Atlantic**
. We are backed by top-notch investors, including
**Sequoia Capital, QIA, Riverwood, and Endeavor Catalyst,**
and trusted by 2000+ customers from high-growth startups to the most prestigious Fortune 500 companies such as Samsung, Nike, L’Oreal, Singapore Airlines, Nestlé, Nissan, Lenovo, Puma, IKEA, Allianz, Domino's, and the list goes on.
  
  
Insider One was congratulated for becoming one of the only
**woman-founded, women-led B2B SaaS unicorns**
in the world. Loved by customers, recognized by analysts,
**we are the only vendor recognized as the #1 leader**
in all the capabilities marketing and customer engagement teams need. Don’t just take our word for it — see for yourself. We consistently outperform and continue our leadership, and the results speak for themselves.
  
  
From day one, Insider One’s mission has not only been to build a world-class product company, but also to create one of the
**most socially progressive technology communities**
in the world. Through our social responsibility initiatives like
*100 Social Responsibility Projects, AI Training for Teachers, Code Academy, SheCodes, SheLeads, and SheMarkables*
, our community has committed to scaling its impact on our communities across 30+ countries, driving initiatives in health, education, farming, animal rights, and increasing women’s representation in STEM.
  
  
Behind all these achievements is an
**exceptionally talented, visionary team of overachievers**
that moves fast and agile, creating cutting-edge products, and focuses on making an impact. If you want to be a part of this journey, just keep reading.
  
  
**About Testinium Tech Hub**
Testinium is our trusted partner in software quality and testing. They offer an open-source-based, enterprise-ready platform for test automation on web, mobile, and desktop. Their headquarters is in Istanbul, with offices in Amsterdam, London, and Berlin. Testinium is now the largest software testing company in Europe and the MENA region, with 950+ employees and 350+ projects. They work with many respected companies in finance, telecom, and e-commerce, like ING, Allianz, PepsiCo, Turkcell, N11, and Udemy.
  
  
**What You Will Do**

* Provide technical support to 800+ global partners using JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and Go
* Fix complex issues on partner websites
* Join meetings with international clients and give live support when needed
* Build user-friendly and high-performance web apps
* Take action to prevent future technical problems
* Work with other teams to ensure smooth processes
* Prioritize tasks based on urgency and partner needs
* Gain hands-on experience with Vue.js, Node.js, React, and Go
* Work in a fast-paced and agile environment

**What You Will Need**

* A degree in Computer Engineering or a related field (or equivalent experience)
* Good knowledge of JavaScript, jQuery, HTML, and CSS
* Basic knowledge of backend development and SQL (advanced knowledge is a plus)
* A proactive and responsible approach to work
* Fluency in Turkish and English
* Good problem-solving and analytical thinking skills
* Ability to manage time well and work on multiple projects
* Curiosity and motivation to keep learning

**Which Team Will You Join**

* You’ll join our Optimus team as a Software Developer. Optimus (Partner Support Development Team) provides technical support behind the scenes. We solve problems, keep our platform running smoothly, and make sure our partners have the best experience. We work fast, solve complex issues, and focus on both product and partner success. In SaaS, partner support means high-quality service — and that’s what Optimus delivers
* This team is responsible for handling incoming requests within the GMT+9 time zone, with shifts starting at 16:00 Turkey time (TRT)

**What We Offer**

* Enjoy a monthly meal allowance designed to enhance your daily routine
* Access comprehensive private health insurance
* Feed your curiosity with access to Spotify, LinkedIn Learning, Blinkist, MasterClass, Neoskola, and CloudGuru
* Level up with internal trainings covering AI fundamentals, coding, foreign languages, and a wide range of personal development skills
* Be part of a diverse team that’s as global as it gets, where every voice is heard and 50+ nationalities build together
* Become a Shareowner through our eligibility-based “ESOP” and own a piece of what you build
* Help build the team you want to work with and enjoy rewarding referral bonuses
* Opportunities to give back to your community through volunteering and purpose-driven social impact projects
* From global retreats to team-building activities, expect year-round events that turn into lifelong memories
* Get inspired by the greatest minds in the tech industry through events like our Tech & Dev Talks
* Work from anywhere in Turkey through our fully remote setup

We provide equal opportunity in a zero-discrimination workplace and not just welcome but also embrace everyone without regard to sex, race, color, nationality, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability status, citizenship, or marital status.
  
  
Please follow Insider One on LinkedIn, Instagram, X, Facebook and Medium!
  
  
We aren't just hiring for a position; we are hiring for a mission — a mission to build a lasting legacy that will set the benchmark for the most progressive tech companies out there.
  
  
To do this, we are looking for exceptional talent to join a community of good-hearted individuals who take high ownership and are relentlessly driven to go the extra mile.
  
  
If this sounds like who you are and where you aspire to be, we are excited to meet you.
  
  
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
